Transcrição Completa: 7 I'd Rather Get Started Next Quarter
[00:00] I'd rather get started next quarter. Man, I hate that one. Huh?
[00:06] Okay, so first of all, we have to have real reasons that people need to act now.
[00:11] If you remember from one of the trainings before all this objection stuff, I talked about incentives.
[00:17] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Urgency Incentive Requirements"
NÚMEROS: Today vs Next Quarter comparison
VISUAL: Comparação temporal entre ação imediata vs postergar 3 meses, ícones de bônus por ação rápida, preços diferenciados
[00:19] Why is somebody going to do it today versus starting next quarter is going to be because you better have something like a fast a fast action bonus, uh better pricing forum, something added to the offer that happens if they do it now versus then.
[00:34] We have to have something that actually once again gives people reasons to do it now versus later.
[00:40] And to be clear, if people don't care about those reasons, then they're going to end up doing it later.
[00:46] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Incentive Reiteration Strategy"
NÚMEROS: 3 months waiting period
VISUAL: Processo de reiteração de incentivos, setas apontando para razões de urgência, timeline comparativo
[00:48] So to overcome this objection, all you really want to do is reiterate the incentives and reasons. Okay?
[00:54] If they don't care about our incentives and reasons, we want to ask the direct question.
[00:59] What's holding you back from doing it right now? Can you be honest with me?
[01:04] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Direct Questioning Script"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Script de questionamento direto, perguntas investigativas para descobrir objeções reais, busca por dados adicionais
[01:06] what's missing from what we're currently offering that would make you pull the trigger today instead of waiting three months. You know, can you be honest with me?
[01:15] Let's try to get that additional data and then work with it from there.
[01:19] But remember, if you have good enough incentives and reasons that people actually give a shit about to do it today versus three months from now, they'll do it today.
[01:28] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Final Strategy Summary"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Resumo da estratégia: revisar incentivos + fazer perguntas diretas, fluxograma de processo de superação de objeção
[01:30] So, look, look at your incentives, reiterate the incentives, and once again, ask direct questions to get the honest answers that you're looking for to work through this one a little better.
